fonts.name: Outfit
fonts.usage: Used for city names, main UI elements, general text.

fonts.name: JetBrains Mono
fonts.usage: Used for temperatures, coordinates, humidity, wind speed, recent search chips, search input, labels.

hierarchy.h1_temperature: text-[100px] md:text-[140px] font-outfit font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2_city: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-outfit font-semibold tracking-tight text-white

layouts.strategy: High Density Bento Grid with Sharp Edges (Zero Border Radius)
layouts.container: max-w-[1400px] mx-auto p-4 md:p-8 min-h-screen flex flex-col gap-8

panels.main_weather: col-span-1 lg:col-span-8 border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden group flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[400px]
panels.forecast_row: col-span-1 lg:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12) on all cards. CRITICAL: Remove all border-radius (rounded-none) for a brutalist, technical feel.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Interactive elements (chips, forecast cards) have a subtle `-translate-y-1` transition. Focus/Active states use a sharp 1px border of #CCFF00.
visual_enhancers.empty_state: Full screen centered layout overlaying the dark atmospheric background. The search bar takes center stage like a terminal prompt.
visual_enhancers.texture: Add a very subtle CSS noise/grain overlay across the entire body to kill the 'digital flatness'.

search_bar.input: w-full bg-transparent border-b-2 border-white/20 text-white font-jetbrains text-2xl md:text-3xl py-4 pl-12 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#CCFF00] transition-colors placeholder:text-white/20 rounded-none
search_bar.icon: absolute left-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-white/50 w-8 h-8
search_bar.autocomplete_dropdown: absolute top-full left-0 w-full bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 mt-2 z-50 shadow-2xl max-h-[300px] overflow-y-auto

recent_searches.chip: px-4 py-1.5 border border-white/20 text-xs font-jetbrains text-white/60 hover:text-black hover:bg-[#CCFF00] hover:border-[#CCFF00] transition-colors cursor-pointer uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none

detail_widget.style: border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between aspect-square hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors
detail_widget.label: uppercase font-jetbrains text-xs text-white/50 tracking-[0.2em]

forecast_card.style: border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6 hover:border-white/30 transition-colors rounded-none

icons.integration: Use via CDN `<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>` and call `lucide.createIcons()` in JS.

image_urls.description: Dark nimbus cumulus clouds. Use this as a full-screen fixed background with opacity-20 and a black gradient overlay for the empty state before a city is searched.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: `data-testid='search-input'`, `data-testid='recent-chip-london'`, `data-testid='forecast-day-1'`.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure #CCFF00 (Volt Yellow) has sufficient contrast for text, or use it exclusively for backgrounds with black text on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a Static HTML/CSS/JS project. DO NOT USE REACT. Build using pure Vanilla JS, plain HTML5, and Tailwind via CDN.
Configure Tailwind in a script tag to include the custom colors (`#050505`, `#121212`, `#CCFF00`) and the Google fonts (Outfit, JetBrains Mono).
Remove ALL border radii. The design uses `rounded-none` everywhere to reinforce the brutalist meteorological vibe.
Implement JS logic to handle empty state vs populated state. When empty, show the search centered over the atmospheric background image.
Persist recent searches in localStorage and dynamically render them as chips.
Ensure `lucide.createIcons()` is called after any DOM updates (like rendering the forecast or current weather).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not make generic centered layouts. Use optical alignment (left-aligned data, structured grids).
Ensure layered z-index hierarchy. The autocomplete/search dropdown must hover above all elements without transparent background bleeding.
DO NOT apply `transition: all`. Use specific transitions like `transition-colors`, `transition-transform`.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters.
Use generous padding. `p-8` or `p-12` on the main weather card is crucial for the high-end feel.
Include hover states and focus outlines (specifically using the accent color #CCFF00) for all interactive areas.
